ChatMessage._: D Cutrone: my last race of the night, gl
D Cutrone: idek how tht happened
T Hall: Thanks for rear ending me Dan. Gave me front and rear damage because I hit the guy in front of me
N Eren: it happened to you before as well Devon
D Cutrone: yeah, im not sure why it does that
A Manocchia: do you have the pull up and down shift to engage neutral option set?
D Cutrone: i might, id have to look
O LOL: gg ferrari chasing me
D Cutrone: im going to do 1 more
D Cutrone: cant end like that
C Smith: thx for tapping me back round Ythier
B Drake: sorry about the contact lol. missed my braking point
O Ibrahim: You guys are fast af
